entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Speaker and founder of Careerspan, articulating insight about career substance and insecurity

entities.name: Anthony
entities.context: Conversation partner who self-identifies with the Careerspan user persona, acknowledges recency bias in own career narrative

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company focused on helping people represent their careers

entities.name: Portfolio Career Insight
entities.context: Framework insight that accumulating career stories creates difficulty in self-representation

entities.name: Insecurity as Signal
entities.context: Belief that the parts people are most insecure about contain the most career substance

entities.name: Recency Bias
entities.context: Tendency to prioritize recent career experiences over formative earlier ones

entities.name: Accumulation Blind Spots
entities.context: Phenomenon where having enough career stories makes it difficult to think back and synthesize

entities.name: Careerspan User Persona
entities.context: Target user profile: people good at the underlying job but bad at representing themselves

relationships.context: V coaching Anthony through career reflection insight
Core belief that insecurities point to where substance lies
Articulating the insight about career accumulation creating blind spots
Self-identifies with the exact target persona
Admits to prioritizing recent over formative career history
Having many stories leads to recency bias in narrative
Target user profile for the product
